npcs.name: Theron Firebrand
npcs.personality: Gruff, laconic, and proud of their craft. Speaks in short sentences. Distrusts magic and magic-users. Judges adventurers by the quality of their equipment.

npcs.name: Roderic Coppervein
npcs.personality: Nervous and excitable, speaks in breathless run-on sentences about reagents and reactions. Prone to accidental self-poisoning. Fiercely proud of their potions.
